rule.descr: SSH Access to Jump Host - Primary Entry Point
pfB_PRI1_v4
Wazuh auto-block rule
SSH Access to pfSense
Allow GUI Access to pfSense
NAT SSH Access to Jump Host - Primary Entry Point
Allow Wazuh to SSH to pfSense to block IPs
Send syslog to Wazuh
Allowing Web access to Wazuh's GUI through Jump Host.
pfSense logs to Wazuh
Jump Host logs to Wazuh
Wazuh manager control commands to agent
Wazuh agent registration and event reporting
Jump Host SSH Access to Wazuh
Jump Host SSH Access to Target VM
Jump Host exclusive SSH access to pfSense
Jump Host exclusive access to pfSense web GUI
Allow ping for network troubleshooting
Allow time synchronization through NTP
Allow HTTPS access for updates and packages
Allow HTTP access for updates and packages
Allow DNS queries for all VMs

alias.name: INTERNAL_NETWORK
alias.descr: This Alias includes the LAN subnet.

alias.name: SSH_PORTS
alias.descr: SSH Ports for all our VMs in our network

alias.name: HTTP_HTTPS_PORTS

alias.name: wazuh_blocklist
alias.descr: IPs that have been automatically blocked by Wazuh
alias.detail: Entry added Thu, 29 Jan 2026 09:56:44 +0000||Entry added Thu, 29 Jan 2026 09:56:44 +0000||Entry added Thu, 29 Jan 2026 09:56:44 +0000

package.name: pfBlockerNG-devel
Backup
package.descr: Tool to Backup and Restore files and directories.

package.name: suricata
package.descr: High Performance Network IDS, IPS and Security Monitoring engine by OISF.

package.name: syslog-ng
package.descr: Syslog-ng syslog server. This service is not intended to replace the default pfSense syslog server but rather acts as an independent syslog server.

config.description: ADs Basic - Collection of ADvertisement Domain Feeds.
PRI1 - Collection of Feeds from the most reputable blocklist providers. (Primary tier)

rule.descr: Internal Network of VMs
rule.eve_log_http_extended_headers: accept, accept-charset, accept-datetime, accept-encoding, accept-language, accept-range, age, allow, authorization, cache-control, connection, content-encoding, content-language, content-length, content-location, content-md5, content-range, content-type, cookie, date, dnt, etags, from, last-modified, link, location, max-forwards, origin, pragma, proxy-authenticate, proxy-authorization, range, referrer, refresh, retry-after, server, set-cookie, te, trailer, transfer-encoding, upgrade, vary, via, warning, www-authenticate, x-authenticated-user, x-flash-version, x-forwarded-proto, x-requested-with
